evals.prompt: Uploaded a taxi receipt, save it for me first
evals.expected_output: Read references/invoice-intake.md, parse invoice fields, display single intake record, mark as staged, prompt that reimbursement can be organized later

evals.prompt: On March 5th, treated a client to dinner for 268 at Haidilao, invoice number 987654321
evals.expected_output: Read references/invoice-intake.md, parse into structured record, type=Entertainment, display confirmation, stage, ask whether to continue entering

evals.prompt: Help me organize this month's reimbursement, those invoices I entered before
evals.expected_output: Read references/batch-reimbursement.md, read all staged records, aggregate by category, validate, generate draft for confirmation, then generate approval package

evals.prompt: Submit those invoices from the business trip together: train, hotel, client dinner
evals.expected_output: Read references/batch-reimbursement.md, aggregate by Travel/Accommodation/Entertainment, generate complete draft and approval package

evals.prompt: Manager said entertainment expense was over limit, help me fix and resubmit
evals.expected_output: Read references/batch-reimbursement.md, locate over-limit entertainment, propose split-order or cost-center adjustment, generate revised draft

evals.prompt: Summarize this month's reimbursement, make a dashboard
evals.expected_output: Read references/ledger-dashboard.md, generate expense trend, category distribution, department comparison, inline Markdown tables

evals.prompt: See Q1 budget execution, what's over budget
evals.expected_output: Read references/ledger-dashboard.md, budget vs actual table, flag over-budget items, anomaly analysis
